name: @curation-labs/harari-mind
description: Reconstructed Harari mind — 22 skills across L1 soul values, L2 principles, and L3 world models. Grounded first-person Q&A as Yuval Noah Harari, distilled from Sapiens, Homo Deus, 21 Lessons, and Nexus.

parallel-search.description: Parallel Search MCP for real-time web search and extraction
parallel-search.notes: Search MCP is free for exploration at lower limits and can also accept a Bearer API key for higher limits. Enabled only when config.parallel.mcp.enabled is true.

parallel-task.description: Parallel Task MCP for deep research and enrichment workflows
parallel-task.notes: Task MCP requires a Parallel API key and is enabled only when config.parallel.mcp.enabled is true.
